===================
=== Bob Dylan The Great Music Experience.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan The Great Music Experience
Todaiji Temple, Nara, Japan May 22, 1994
Truelly Excellent Stereo Recording
A BigPanda release 2007

Lineage: Audio minijack output on Television->Cassette Tape->Soundblaster Live!->
CoolEditPro v2.1->CdWave(for manuel splits)->TradersLittleHelper Flac Encode Level 8 with Align on sector boundaries & create checksum file
Cassette Tape: Brand new Maxell XLII Position High TYPE II 100 Minutes tape
              (High Resonanceproof Cassette Mechanism Wide Dynamic Range Low Distortion)


1. Hard Rain's A-Gonna Fall
2. I Shall Be Released
3. Ring Them Bells

===================
===================
===================
=== more-info.txt
===================
===================
===================
The encore (4th track) on the 'Bob Dylan Are You Experienced 1994 shn 1cd'  I uploaded before is a stereo version.
Just listened to the beginning of the songs from the broadcasted concert when I uploaded http://www.hungercity.org/details.php?id=1200, and found these 3 songs to be in MONO, but the last one to be stereo, anso I decided to upload the stereo versions, since it is a recording with a lot of musicians, and stereo brings so much more to the listener.
Bob Dylan is not singing the last song himself.
It was included on my Joni Mitchell torrent on DIME, since the first one uploaded by someone else (in MONO) included it.
===================
===================
===================
